prompt: Build a live product search in ZIO HTTP where the results update as the user types, with a 300ms debounce so it doesn't fire on every keystroke, using Datastar.

assertions.text: Uses events { handler { ... } } for SSE streaming (not event)
Uses dataOn.input.debounce(300.millis) to debounce input events
Declares Signal[String] and uses dataSignals + dataBind for search input
Includes datastarScript in the HTML head
Uses ServerSentEventGenerator.patchElements with PatchElementOptions.Append for appending results
Reads search term from request and implements search filter logic
Has sample product list to search against (at least 10 products)
